case_title: EAST WEST BANK, A CA. CORP. VS. CARRYOU LIMOUSINE, INC. A CA. CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2002, DEFAULT PROVE-UP IN SCD 218 AT 09:00 AM ON NOVEMBER 7,2002 GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK, A CA. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRYOU LIMOUSINE, INC. A CA. CORP. ENDANG, SALIM AN INDIVIDUAL $173,820.00 PRINCIPAL, $14,303.00 INTEREST, $405.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $188,528.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
